# Reports and Publications

This section describes best practices related to emLab reports and publications.

The pages below cover the conventions and tools we use when preparing emLab outputs:

- **[emLab affiliation and author contribution](affiliation-and-authorship.qmd)** — recommended affiliation lines for emLab staff and the CRediT-based template for documenting author contributions.
- **[Reports](reports.qmd)** — the emLab report template and uploading final reports to Zenodo.
- **[Making your data publicly available](publishing-data.qmd)** — depositing data to Dryad alongside a publication.
- **[Sharing public data, Shiny apps, and tools on our website](sharing-on-website.qmd)** — letting Erin know so we can feature it.
